name: Virtual Workspace + 512GB Secondary Storage
postStartCommand:
bash -c '
    echo "=== 512GB Secondary Storage Check ==="
    if ! mountpoint -q /workspaces/bigdata; then
      echo "Trying to mount BIGDATA secondary storage..."
      # Try mount by label (safer)
      sudo mount LABEL=BIGDATA /workspaces/bigdata 2>/dev/null || {
        echo "WARNING: BIGDATA disk not found or not formatted."
        echo "You may need to run manual mount after stop/start or rebuild."
      }
    else
      echo "BIGDATA already mounted."
    fi
    
    # Fix permissions just in case
    sudo chown -R codespace:codespace /workspaces/bigdata 2>/dev/null || true
    
    # Show status
    df -h /workspaces/bigdata 2>/dev/null | tail -1 || echo "No bigdata mount detected."
    echo "Main workspace status: $(df -h /workspaces | tail -1)"
  '
